# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.

Write secure code.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    
    parameters {
        choice(
            name: 'DEPLOY_ENV',
            choices: ['staging', 'production'],
            description: 'Select deployment environment'
        )
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_URLS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Comma-separated list of artifact URLs to deploy'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOY_SERVERS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Comma-separated list of deployment servers'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'VALIDATE_ARTIFACTS',
            defaultValue: true,
            description: 'Validate artifact integrity before deployment'
        )
    }
    
    environment {
        ARTIFACT_DIR = "${WORKSPACE}/artifacts"
        DEPLOY_USER = 'deploy'
        DEPLOY_KEY = credentials('deploy-key')
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Validate Inputs') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (params.ARTIFACT_URLS == null || params.ARTIFACT_URLS.trim() == '') {
                        error 'ARTIFACT_URLS parameter is required'
                    }
                    if (params.DEPLOY_SERVERS == null || params.DEPLOY_SERVERS.trim() == '') {
                        error 'DEPLOY_SERVERS parameter is required'
                    }
                    
                    def urls = params.ARTIFACT_URLS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }
                    def servers = params.DEPLOY_SERVERS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }
                    
                    if (urls.size() == 0) {
                        error 'At least one artifact URL must be provided'
                    }
                    if (servers.size() == 0) {
                        error 'At least one deployment server must be provided'
                    }
                    
                    // Validate URLs are from allowed domains
                    def allowedDomains = ['s3.amazonaws.com', 'artifactory.company.com', 'repo.company.com']
                    urls.each { url ->
                        def isValid = allowedDomains.any { domain -> url.contains(domain) }
                        if (!isValid) {
                            error "URL ${url} is not from an allowed domain"
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Download Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh "mkdir -p ${ARTIFACT_DIR}"
                    def urls = params.ARTIFACT_URLS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }
                    
                    urls.each { url ->
                        echo "Downloading artifact from: ${url}"
                        
                        // Validate URL format
                        if (!url.startsWith('http')) {
                            error "Invalid URL format: ${url}"
                        }
                        
                        // Download with retry logic
                        retry(3) {
                            sh """
                                if curl -f -L --output ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/\$(basename ${url}) ${url}; then
                                    echo "Download successful: \$(basename ${url})"
                                else
                                    echo "Download failed: ${url}"
                                    exit 1
                                fi
                            """
                        }
                        
                        // Validate file was downloaded
                        def filename = sh(script: "basename ${url}", returnStdout: true).trim()
                        def fileExists = sh(script: "test -f ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/${filename} && echo 'exists' || echo 'missing'", returnStdout: true).trim()
                        
                        if (fileExists != 'exists') {
                            error "Failed to download artifact: ${filename}"
                        }
                        
                        // Optional integrity validation
                        if (params.VALIDATE_ARTIFACTS) {
                            echo "Validating artifact integrity for: ${filename}"
                            // Add checksum validation here if needed
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deploy Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = params.DEPLOY_SERVERS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }
                    def urls = params.ARTIFACT_URLS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }
                    
                    parallel {
                        servers.each { server ->
                            def serverName = server
                            stage("Deploy to ${serverName}") {
                                steps {
                                    script {
                                        echo "Deploying to server: ${serverName}"
                                        
                                        // Validate server format
                                        if (!serverName.contains(':')) {
                                            error "Invalid server format: ${serverName}"
                                        }
                                        
                                        def host = serverName.split(':')[0]
                                        def port = serverName.split(':')[1] ?: '22'
                                        
                                        // Deploy using scp
                                        def files = sh(script: "ls ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/*", returnStdout: true).trim().split('\n')
                                        
                                        files.each { file ->
                                            echo "Deploying ${file} to ${host}:${port}"
                                            
                                            withCredentials([sshUserPrivateKey(credentialsId: 'deploy-key', keyFileVariable: 'SSH_KEY')]) {
                                                sh """
                                                    scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ${SSH_KEY} \\
                                                        ${file} ${DEPLOY_USER}@${host}:${file}
                                                """
                                            }
                                        }
                                        
                                        // Optional post-deployment validation
                                        withCredentials([sshUserPrivateKey(credentialsId: 'deploy-key', keyFileVariable: 'SSH_KEY')]) {
                                            sh """
                                                ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ${SSH_KEY} ${DEPLOY_USER}@${host} \\
                                                    'echo "Deployment completed on ${host}"'
                                            """
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    post {
        always {
            cleanWs()
        }
        success {
            echo 'Deployment completed successfully'
        }
        failure {
            echo 'Deployment failed'
        }
    }
}
